message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.pinv wrapper parity (franken_numpy-w3lj)

Add fnp_python.pinv(a, rcond=None, hermitian=False, *, rtol=None)
that matches np.linalg.pinv. Real 2-D inputs are routed directly
into the Rust fnp_linalg::pinv_mxn / pinv_hermitian_nxn paths
(with rcond/rtol tolerance-alias resolution) for zero-overhead
parity, while complex / batched / non-2-D shapes passthrough to
numpy so all native numpy edge cases are preserved exactly.

Wired fnp-linalg as a new path dep on fnp-python so the Rust fast
path can reach pinv_{mxn,hermitian_nxn}_with_tolerance_aliases.

Covered by three pyo3 oracle tests: cross-shape/rcond/hermitian
allclose parity vs numpy, rtol keyword-only error-surface parity,
and a fast-path assertion that supported real inputs skip the
numpy delegation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
